name: Verify G+ General Ability
description: Verify G+ measures general cognitive ability including inductive, deductive, and numerical reasoning. Suitable for graduate and managerial level candidates. Adaptive test with high precision for senior hiring.

name: Verify Interactive G+ General Ability
description: Interactive version of Verify G+ with scenario-based items measuring general cognitive ability. Provides engaging candidate experience with real-world context for problem solving and critical thinking.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to work performance. Predicts job performance, leadership potential, and team effectiveness. Widely used for all job levels from graduate to executive.

name: OPQ32
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire 32 standard version. Measures 32 personality characteristics predictive of workplace behavior. Comprehensive assessment for selection and development.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Assesses 18 dimensions of workplace motivation including achievement drive, commercial outlook, and social responsibility. Helps identify what energizes and drives individual performance.

name: Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to interpret and work with numerical data including tables, graphs, and statistics. Essential for finance, banking, data analysis, engineering, and management roles requiring quantitative decision-making.

name: Verify Numerical Ability
description: Assesses ability to analyze and interpret numerical data and make data-driven decisions. Highly reliable for graduate recruitment and roles requiring financial or quantitative analysis.

name: Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand and evaluate written information. Critical for roles involving communications, HR, legal, consulting, and management where reading comprehension and inference is essential.

name: Verify Verbal Ability
description: Verifies candidate's verbal reasoning ability in a supervised setting after unsupervised screening. Measures understanding of verbal arguments and written information for graduate and professional roles.

name: Inductive Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to identify patterns and rules in abstract information, indicating general learning agility and problem-solving. Suitable for technical, engineering, IT, and managerial roles.

name: Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to draw logical conclusions from given premises. Critical for roles requiring precise analysis, consulting, law, and strategic decision making.

name: Spatial Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to mentally rotate, visualize, and manipulate objects and spatial relationships. Key for engineering, design, architecture, and technical roles.

name: Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of mechanical principles, physics concepts, and how mechanical systems operate. Ideal for engineering, manufacturing, trades, and technical maintenance roles.

name: Customer Contact Scenarios
description: Situational judgment test measuring ability to handle customer service scenarios effectively. Assesses service orientation, communication, empathy, and problem resolution for contact center and customer-facing roles.

name: Service Scenarios
description: Scenario-based assessment measuring customer service behaviors and decisions. Evaluates how candidates respond to realistic service situations including conflict resolution and customer satisfaction.

name: Managerial Scenarios
description: Situational judgment assessment measuring management decision-making, people management, and leadership effectiveness through realistic workplace scenarios. For middle and senior management selection.

name: Supervisory Scenarios
description: Assesses supervisory judgment and effectiveness through realistic work scenarios. Measures team management, task prioritization, and interpersonal skills for first-line supervisor and team leader roles.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses knowledge and skills in Java 8 programming including streams, lambdas, functional interfaces, and object-oriented concepts. For software developer and engineer roles requiring Java expertise.

name: Java Programming
description: Comprehensive Java programming knowledge test covering core Java, data structures, algorithms, and design patterns. Suitable for Java developers, software engineers, and backend development roles.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses Python programming skills including syntax, data structures, libraries, and Pythonic code practices. Essential for data science, machine learning, backend development, and automation roles.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests JavaScript programming skills including ES6+ features, DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, and modern JavaScript patterns. For frontend, fullstack, and Node.js developer roles.

name: SQL (New)
description: Tests SQL knowledge including queries, joins, aggregations, indexing, and database design. Suitable for data analysts, database administrators, backend developers, and data engineers.

name: C# (New)
description: Assesses C# programming knowledge including .NET framework, object-oriented programming, LINQ, and enterprise application development patterns.

name: C++ (New)
description: Tests C++ programming skills including memory management, STL, templates, and systems programming concepts. For embedded systems, game development, and performance-critical software roles.

name: General Sales Aptitude
description: Measures aptitude for sales roles including persuasion, resilience, goal orientation, and relationship building. Suitable for sales representatives, account executives, and business development roles.

name: Financial Analyst Aptitude
description: Assesses the cognitive skills required for financial analyst roles including numerical reasoning, data interpretation, and quantitative analysis. For finance, investment banking, and accounting positions.

name: Technology Professional 8.0
description: Comprehensive technology assessment covering software development, IT infrastructure, architecture, and systems thinking. Designed for senior technical professionals and technology managers.

name: Graduate 8.0
description: Comprehensive graduate-level assessment measuring numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning. Designed for entry-level graduate roles across all industries. Benchmarked against graduate-level population.

name: Managerial & Professional 8.0
description: Assessment battery measuring verbal, numerical, and deductive reasoning for managerial and professional-level roles. Designed for mid to senior level hiring decisions.

name: Administrative Professional 8.0
description: Assesses cognitive abilities relevant to administrative and clerical roles including numerical checking, verbal reasoning, and attention to detail. For administrative assistants, coordinators, and office managers.

name: Operational & Technical 8.0
description: Measures reasoning abilities for operational and technical roles including mechanical comprehension, spatial reasoning, and checking. Suitable for manufacturing, engineering technicians, and skilled trades.

name: Workplace Safety (New)
description: Assesses safety-related behaviors, risk awareness, and compliance orientation. Predicts unsafe behaviors and accidents. Essential for industrial, manufacturing, construction, and logistics roles.

name: Remote Work
description: Assesses candidate's suitability for remote work environments including self-discipline, digital communication, time management, and virtual collaboration skills.

name: Check (New)
description: Measures speed and accuracy in checking detailed information for errors. Essential for data entry, quality control, finance, compliance, and administrative roles requiring high attention to detail.

name: Data Entry 7.0
description: Simulates realistic data entry tasks and measures speed, accuracy, and proficiency. Suitable for data entry clerks, administrative staff, and back-office operations roles.

name: Calculation (New)
description: Tests basic mathematical and arithmetic calculation skills. Suitable for roles requiring everyday numerical tasks including retail, banking, clerical, and financial processing roles.

name: Occupational English Test
description: Assesses English language proficiency in occupational contexts including reading, writing, and comprehension. For multinational organizations hiring non-native English speakers.

name: Business English Vocabulary Test
description: Tests knowledge of business-oriented English vocabulary and comprehension. Suitable for international business roles and client-facing positions requiring professional English communication.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Tests proficiency in Microsoft Excel including formulas, pivot tables, data analysis, and reporting. Suitable for financial analysts, administrative professionals, and data-focused roles.

name: MS Office
description: Assesses proficiency across Microsoft Office applications including Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook. For administrative, coordinator, and office professional roles.

name: Leadership Report
description: Generates a targeted leadership profile report based on OPQ personality data. Evaluates leadership potential, style, and development areas. Used for senior leadership selection and executive assessment.

name: Universal Competency Report
description: Provides detailed competency-based report from OPQ personality assessment. Maps personality traits to 20 universal competencies for comprehensive selection and development decisions.

name: Sales Report
description: Generates a targeted sales performance profile from OPQ personality data. Predicts sales behaviors including prospecting, closing, relationship building, and resilience to rejection.

name: Call Center Scenarios
description: Situational judgment assessment for call center and customer support roles. Measures ability to handle inbound calls, resolve customer complaints, and maintain professionalism under pressure.

name: Team Roles Indicator
description: Identifies preferred team roles and working styles. Based on established team dynamics research. Helps build balanced teams and improve team effectiveness and collaboration.

name: Advanced Counting
description: Measures speed and accuracy in counting tasks and rapid numerical processing. Suitable for banking operations, financial processing, retail, and roles requiring fast numerical accuracy.

name: Coding Skills (SHL)
description: Hands-on coding assessment measuring practical programming ability across multiple languages. Tests algorithmic thinking, problem solving, code quality, and debugging skills for software developers.

name: Operational Judgment
description: Measures ability to make sound operational decisions in work scenarios. Assesses planning, resource allocation, and practical problem-solving for operational and frontline manager roles.

name: Customer Service Approach
description: Personality-based questionnaire measuring service orientation, empathy, patience, and customer-focus behaviors. For hiring in customer service, retail, hospitality, and support roles.

name: Resilience Questionnaire
description: Assesses emotional resilience, stress tolerance, adaptability, and coping mechanisms. Useful for high-pressure environments including military, emergency services, healthcare, and demanding corporate roles.

name: Graduate Aptitude Test
description: Comprehensive aptitude battery for graduate-level hiring. Measures verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning for graduate scheme entry and campus recruitment.

name: Account Manager Solution
description: Targeted assessment for account management roles measuring relationship building, commercial acumen, negotiation skills, and customer retention focus.

name: Financial Calculations
description: Assesses ability to perform financial calculations including interest rates, ratios, percentages, and basic accounting concepts. For finance, banking, insurance, and financial planning roles.

name: Attention to Detail
description: Measures ability to spot errors and inconsistencies in detailed textual and numerical information. Critical for quality control, compliance, legal, finance, and data-intensive roles.

name: Work Concerns Questionnaire
description: Measures potential work-related concerns and counterproductive work behaviors. Identifies risk of absenteeism, theft, aggression, and integrity issues for sensitive roles and high-trust environments.

name: Workplace Personality Inventory
description: Comprehensive workplace personality inventory measuring work styles, interpersonal preferences, and behavioral tendencies. Used for selection, development, and team building across all job levels.

name: Situational Judgment Test
description: General situational judgment assessment presenting realistic workplace scenarios. Measures how candidates approach complex work situations, prioritize competing demands, and make sound decisions.

name: Learning Agility
description: Assesses ability to learn from experience, adapt to new situations, and apply new knowledge effectively. Critical predictor of leadership potential and performance in ambiguous, complex environments.

name: Technical Skills Screening
description: Screens candidates on specific technical skills relevant to the role. Covers a broad range of technical domains including IT, engineering, software development, and data science.

name: DevOps (New)
description: Assesses DevOps knowledge including CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, cloud infrastructure, monitoring, and automation. For DevOps engineers, SREs, and cloud operations roles.

name: Amazon Web Services (New)
description: Tests AWS cloud services knowledge including compute, storage, networking, security, and serverless architecture. For cloud engineers, solutions architects, and DevOps professionals.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Tests machine learning concepts including supervised/unsupervised learning, model evaluation, deep learning, and ML best practices. For data scientists, ML engineers, and AI researchers.

name: Data Analysis using Python
description: Assesses data analysis skills using Python including pandas, numpy, matplotlib, and data manipulation. For data analysts, data scientists, and analytics engineers.

name: Core Java (New)
description: Tests core Java programming fundamentals including OOP, collections, exception handling, and multi-threading. For Java developers at all levels from junior to senior.

name: Spring Framework (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of the Spring Framework including Spring Boot, Spring MVC, dependency injection, and REST API development. For Java backend developers working with enterprise Spring applications.

name: React (New)
description: Tests React.js knowledge including components, hooks, state management, and modern React patterns. For frontend and fullstack developers building modern web applications.

name: Node.js (New)
description: Assesses Node.js skills including asynchronous programming, event-driven architecture, REST API development, and npm ecosystem. For backend and fullstack JavaScript developers.

name: Scala (New)
description: Tests Scala programming skills including functional programming concepts, Akka, and Spark integration. For data engineers, backend developers, and big data engineers.

name: Kotlin (New)
description: Assesses Kotlin programming for Android and backend development. Covers coroutines, null safety, and Kotlin idioms for mobile and JVM-based application development.

name: Android (New)
description: Tests Android application development knowledge including activities, fragments, Jetpack components, and Android architecture patterns. For mobile developers building Android applications.

name: iOS/Swift (New)
description: Assesses iOS development skills using Swift including UIKit, SwiftUI, and iOS architecture patterns. For mobile developers building iOS and Apple platform applications.

name: Entrepreneurship
description: Assesses entrepreneurial mindset including innovation orientation, risk tolerance, opportunity recognition, and commercial drive. For startups, intrapreneurs, and innovation-led roles.

name: Abstract Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns and relationships in abstract visual information. A strong predictor of learning speed and adaptability, useful for technical, scientific, and managerial roles.

name: Numerical Checking
description: Measures speed and accuracy in checking numerical information for errors. Suitable for banking, financial processing, auditing, and compliance roles requiring numerical accuracy.
